title: centaurea scabiosa subsp. tematinensis
intro: Centaurea scabiosa subsp. tematinensis, also known as the scabious, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, and it is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Centaurea scabiosa subsp. tematinensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made as infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be used to create teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
